### FILE: src/pages/brand/Login.tsx (120 lines)

```tsx
import { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
import { Link, useNavigate } from 'react-router-dom';
import { Building2, AlertCircle, Home } from 'lucide-react';
import { useAuth } from '../../lib/auth';

export default function BrandLogin() {
  const [email, setEmail] = useState('');
  const [password, setPassword] = useState('');
  const [error, setError] = useState('');
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);
  const { signIn, user, profile, loading: authLoading } = useAuth();
  const navigate = useNavigate();

  useEffect(() => {
    if (!authLoading && user && profile) {
      const allowedRoles = ['brand_admin', 'admin', 'platform_admin'];
      if (allowedRoles.includes(profile.role)) {
        navigate('/brand/dashboard', { replace: true });
      }
    }
  }, [user, profile, authLoading, navigate]);

  const handleSubmit = async (e: React.FormEvent) => {
    e.preventDefault();
    setError('');
    setLoading(true);

    const { error: signInError } = await signIn(email, password);

    if (signInError) {
      setError(signInError.message);
      setLoading(false);
      return;
    }

    navigate('/brand/dashboard', { replace: true });
  };

  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen bg-gray-50 flex items-center justify-center p-4">
      <div className="w-full max-w-md">
        <Link
          to="/"
          className="flex items-center gap-2 text-gray-600 hover:text-gray-900 mb-6 transition-colors"
        >
          <Home className="w-4 h-4" />
          <span className="text-sm">Back to Home</span>
        </Link>

        <div className="bg-white rounded-lg shadow-sm p-8 border border-gray-200">
          <div className="flex items-center justify-center mb-6">
            <div className="w-14 h-14 bg-gradient-to-br from-blue-600 to-blue-700 rounded-xl flex items-center justify-center">
              <Building2 className="w-7 h-7 text-white" />
            </div>
          </div>

          <h1 className="text-2xl font-bold text-center text-gray-900 mb-2">
            Brand Portal
          </h1>
          <p className="text-center text-gray-600 mb-6">
            Manage your brand content and submissions
          </p>

          {error && (
            <div className="mb-4 p-3 bg-red-50 border border-red-200 rounded-lg flex items-start gap-2">
              <AlertCircle className="w-5 h-5 text-red-600 flex-shrink-0 mt-0.5" />
              <p className="text-sm text-red-700">{error}</p>
            </div>
          )}

          <form onSubmit={handleSubmit} className="space-y-4">
            <div>
              <label htmlFor="email" className="block text-sm font-medium text-gray-900 mb-2">
                Email Address
              </label>
              <input
                id="email"
                type="email"
                value={email}
                onChange={(e) => setEmail(e.target.value)}
                required
                className="w-full px-4 py-2 border border-gray-300 rounded-lg focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500 focus:border-blue-500"
                placeholder="brand@naturopathica.com"
              />
            </div>

            <div>
              <label htmlFor="password" className="block text-sm font-medium text-gray-900 mb-2">
                Password
              </label>
              <input
                id="password"
                type="password"
                value={password}
                onChange={(e) => setPassword(e.target.value)}
                required
                className="w-full px-4 py-2 border border-gray-300 rounded-lg focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500 focus:border-blue-500"
                placeholder="••••••••"
              />
            </div>

            <button
              type="submit"
              disabled={loading}
              className="w-full py-3 bg-blue-600 text-white font-semibold rounded-lg hover:bg-blue-700 disabled:bg-gray-400 disabled:cursor-not-allowed transition-colors"
            >
              {loading ? 'Authenticating...' : 'Access Brand Portal'}
            </button>
          </form>

          <div className="mt-6 p-3 bg-gray-50 rounded-lg border border-gray-200">
            <p className="text-xs text-gray-600 text-center">
              Brand portal access for approved brand partners only
            </p>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

```

### FILE: src/pages/brand/Plans.tsx (226 lines)

```tsx
import { useEffect, useState } from 'react';
import { useAuth } from '../../lib/auth';
import { supabase } from '../../lib/supabase';
import { FileText, TrendingUp, DollarSign, Calendar, AlertCircle } from 'lucide-react';

interface BrandPlan {
  id: string;
  business_id: string;
  business_name: string;
  fit_score: number | null;
  created_at: string;
  status: string;
  opening_order_value: number;
}

export default function BrandPlans() {
  const { profile } = useAuth();
  const [plans, setPlans] = useState<BrandPlan[]>([]);
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
  const [error, setError] = useState<string | null>(null);

  useEffect(() => {
    fetchPlans();
  }, [profile]);

  const fetchPlans = async () => {
    if (!profile?.brand_id) {
      setError('No brand associated with your account');
      setLoading(false);
      return;
    }

    try {
      const { data: plansData, error: plansError } = await supabase
        .from('plans')
        .select('id, business_id, fit_score, created_at, status, businesses!inner(name)')
        .eq('brand_id', profile.brand_id)
        .order('created_at', { ascending: false });

      if (plansError) throw plansError;

      const plansWithOrders = await Promise.all(
        (plansData || []).map(async (plan) => {
          const { data: outputData } = await supabase
            .from('business_plan_outputs')
            .select('output_data')
            .eq('plan_id', plan.id)
            .eq('output_type', 'opening_order')
            .maybeSingle();

          let orderValue = 0;
          if (outputData?.output_data && typeof outputData.output_data === 'object' && 'totalCost' in outputData.output_data) {
            orderValue = Number(outputData.output_data.totalCost) || 0;
          }

          return {
            id: plan.id,
            business_id: plan.business_id,
            business_name: (plan.businesses as any)?.name || 'Unknown Business',
            fit_score: plan.fit_score,
            created_at: plan.created_at,
            status: plan.status || 'draft',
            opening_order_value: orderValue,
          };
        })
      );

      setPlans(plansWithOrders);
    } catch (err: any) {
      console.error('Error fetching plans:', err);
      setError(err.message || 'Failed to load plans');
    } finally {
      setLoading(false);
    }
  };

  const getStatusBadge = (status: string) => {
    const styles: Record<string, string> = {
      draft: 'bg-gray-100 text-gray-700',
      completed: 'bg-green-100 text-green-700',
      in_progress: 'bg-blue-100 text-blue-700',
    };
    return styles[status] || styles.draft;
  };

  if (loading) {
    return (
      <div className="flex items-center justify-center py-12">
        <div className="text-center">
          <div className="w-12 h-12 border-4 border-blue-600 border-t-transparent rounded-full animate-spin mx-auto mb-4"></div>
          <p className="text-gray-600">Loading plans...</p>
        </div>
      </div>
    );
  }

  if (error) {
    return (
      <div className="bg-red-50 border border-red-200 rounded-lg p-6">
        <div className="flex items-start gap-3">
          <AlertCircle className="w-6 h-6 text-red-600 flex-shrink-0 mt-0.5" />
          <div>
            <h3 className="text-lg font-semibold text-red-900 mb-2">Error Loading Plans</h3>
            <p className="text-red-700">{error}</p>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    );
  }

  const totalValue = plans.reduce((sum, plan) => sum + plan.opening_order_value, 0);
  const avgFitScore = plans.length > 0
    ? plans.reduce((sum, plan) => sum + (plan.fit_score || 0), 0) / plans.length
    : 0;

  return (
    <div className="space-y-6">
      <div>
        <h1 className="text-2xl font-bold text-gray-900 mb-2">Brand Plans</h1>
        <p className="text-gray-600">
          View all businesses that have analyzed fit with your brand
        </p>
      </div>

      <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 gap-6">
        <div className="bg-white rounded-lg border border-gray-200 p-6">
          <div className="flex items-center gap-3 mb-2">
            <FileText className="w-5 h-5 text-blue-600" />
            <span className="text-sm text-gray-600">Total Plans</span>
          </div>
          <div className="text-3xl font-bold text-gray-900">{plans.length}</div>
        </div>
        <div className="bg-white rounded-lg border border-gray-200 p-6">
          <div className="flex items-center gap-3 mb-2">
            <TrendingUp className="w-5 h-5 text-purple-600" />
            <span className="text-sm text-gray-600">Avg Fit Score</span>
          </div>
          <div className="text-3xl font-bold text-gray-900">{Math.round(avgFitScore)}%</div>
        </div>
        <div className="bg-white rounded-lg border border-gray-200 p-6">
          <div className="flex items-center gap-3 mb-2">
            <DollarSign className="w-5 h-5 text-green-600" />
            <span className="text-sm text-gray-600">Total Pipeline</span>
          </div>
          <div className="text-3xl font-bold text-gray-900">${totalValue.toLocaleString()}</div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div className="bg-white rounded-lg border border-gray-200 overflow-hidden">
        {plans.length === 0 ? (
          <div className="text-center py-12">
            <FileText className="w-16 h-16 mx-auto mb-4 text-gray-300" />
            <p className="text-gray-600 mb-2">No plans yet</p>
            <p className="text-sm text-gray-500">
              Plans will appear here when businesses analyze their fit with your brand
            </p>
          </div>
        ) : (
          <div className="overflow-x-auto">
            <table className="w-full">
              <thead className="bg-gray-50 border-b border-gray-200">
                <tr>
                  <th className="px-6 py-3 text-left text-xs font-medium text-gray-500 uppercase tracking-wider">
                    Business
                  </th>
                  <th className="px-6 py-3 text-left text-xs font-medium text-gray-500 uppercase tracking-wider">
                    Fit Score
                  </th>
                  <th className="px-6 py-3 text-left text-xs font-medium text-gray-500 uppercase tracking-wider">
                    Opening Order
                  </th>
                  <th className="px-6 py-3 text-left text-xs font-medium text-gray-500 uppercase tracking-wider">
                    Created
                  </th>
                  <th className="px-6 py-3 text-left text-xs font-medium text-gray-500 uppercase tracking-wider">
                    Status
                  </th>
                </tr>
              </thead>
              <tbody className="bg-white divide-y divide-gray-200">
                {plans.map((plan) => (
                  <tr key={plan.id} className="hover:bg-gray-50">
                    <td className="px-6 py-4 whitespace-nowrap">
                      <div className="font-medium text-gray-900">{plan.business_name}</div>
                    </td>
                    <td className="px-6 py-4 whitespace-nowrap">
                      {plan.fit_score !== null ? (
                        <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
                          <div className="text-lg font-bold text-blue-600">{plan.fit_score}%</div>
                          <div className="w-24 h-2 bg-gray-200 rounded-full overflow-hidden">
                            <div
                              className="h-full bg-blue-600"
                              style={{ width: `${plan.fit_score}%` }}
                            />
                          </div>
                        </div>
                      ) : (
                        <span className="text-gray-400">-</span>
                      )}
                    </td>
                    <td className="px-6 py-4 whitespace-nowrap">
                      <span className="text-gray-900 font-medium">
                        ${plan.opening_order_value.toLocaleString()}
                      </span>
                    </td>
                    <td className="px-6 py-4 whitespace-nowrap text-sm text-gray-600">
                      <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
                        <Calendar className="w-4 h-4" />
                        {new Date(plan.created_at).toLocaleDateString()}
                      </div>
                    </td>
                    <td className="px-6 py-4 whitespace-nowrap">
                      <span className={`px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-xs font-medium ${getStatusBadge(plan.status)}`}>
                        {plan.status}
                      </span>
                    </td>
                  </tr>
                ))}
              </tbody>
            </table>
          </div>
        )}
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

```

### FILE: src/pages/business/BrandDetail.tsx (457 lines)

```tsx
import { useEffect, useState } from 'react';
import { useParams, Link, useNavigate } from 'react-router-dom';
import { ArrowLeft, Sparkles, Clock, Package, ShoppingBag, Calendar, TrendingUp } from 'lucide-react';
import { supabase } from '../../lib/supabase';
import BusinessNav from '../../components/BusinessNav';

interface Brand {
  id: string;
  name: string;
  slug: string;
  description: string | null;
  status: string;
}

interface Protocol {
  id: string;
  protocol_name: string;
  duration_minutes: number | null;
  description: string | null;
}

interface ProProduct {
  id: string;
  product_name: string;
  size: string | null;
  unit_cost: number | null;
  category: string | null;
}

interface RetailProduct {
  id: string;
  product_name: string;
  size: string | null;
  retail_price: number | null;
  category: string | null;
}

interface MarketingItem {
  id: string;
  event_name: string;
  event_type: string | null;
  start_date: string | null;
  end_date: string | null;
  description: string | null;
}

export default function BrandDetail() {
  const { slug } = useParams<{ slug: string }>();
  const navigate = useNavigate();

  const [brand, setBrand] = useState<Brand | null>(null);
  const [protocols, setProtocols] = useState<Protocol[]>([]);
  const [proProducts, setProProducts] = useState<ProProduct[]>([]);
  const [retailProducts, setRetailProducts] = useState<RetailProduct[]>([]);
  const [marketingItems, setMarketingItems] = useState<MarketingItem[]>([]);
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
  const [error, setError] = useState<string | null>(null);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (slug) {
      fetchBrandData();
    }
  }, [slug]);

  const fetchBrandData = async () => {
    try {
      setLoading(true);
      setError(null);

      const { data: brandData, error: brandError } = await supabase
        .from('brands')
        .select('*')
        .eq('slug', slug)
        .eq('status', 'active')
        .maybeSingle();

      if (brandError) throw brandError;
      if (!brandData) {
        setError('Brand not found or not active');
        setLoading(false);
        return;
      }

      setBrand(brandData);

      const [protocolsRes, proProductsRes, retailProductsRes, marketingRes] = await Promise.all([
        supabase
          .from('canonical_protocols')
          .select('id, protocol_name, duration_minutes, description')
          .eq('brand_id', brandData.id)
          .in('completion_status', ['steps_complete', 'fully_complete'])
          .order('protocol_name'),

        supabase
          .from('pro_products')
          .select('id, product_name, size, unit_cost, category')
          .eq('brand_id', brandData.id)
          .order('product_name'),

        supabase
          .from('retail_products')
          .select('id, product_name, size, retail_price, category')
          .eq('brand_id', brandData.id)
          .order('product_name'),

        supabase
          .from('marketing_calendar')
          .select('id, event_name, event_type, start_date, end_date, description')
          .order('start_date', { ascending: false })
          .limit(12)
      ]);

      if (protocolsRes.error) {
        console.error('Protocols query error:', protocolsRes.error);
      }
      if (proProductsRes.error) {
        console.error('PRO products query error:', proProductsRes.error);
      }
      if (retailProductsRes.error) {
        console.error('Retail products query error:', retailProductsRes.error);
      }
      if (marketingRes.error) {
        console.error('Marketing query error:', marketingRes.error);
      }

      setProtocols(protocolsRes.data || []);
      setProProducts(proProductsRes.data || []);
      setRetailProducts(retailProductsRes.data || []);
      setMarketingItems(marketingRes.data || []);
    } catch (err) {
      console.error('Error fetching brand data:', err);
      setError('Failed to load brand details');
    } finally {
      setLoading(false);
    }
  };

  const formatCurrency = (amount: number | null) => {
    if (amount === null) return 'N/A';
    return new Intl.NumberFormat('en-US', {
      style: 'currency',
      currency: 'USD',
    }).format(amount);
  };

  const formatDate = (dateString: string | null) => {
    if (!dateString) return 'N/A';
    return new Date(dateString).toLocaleDateString('en-US', {
      year: 'numeric',
      month: 'short',
      day: 'numeric',
    });
  };

  if (loading) {
    return (
      <div className="flex items-center justify-center min-h-screen">
        <div className="text-center">
          <div className="animate-spin rounded-full h-12 w-12 border-b-2 border-blue-600 mx-auto"></div>
          <p className="text-slate-600 mt-4">Loading brand details...</p>
        </div>
      </div>
    );
  }

  if (error || !brand) {
    return (
      <div className="max-w-4xl mx-auto py-12">
        <div className="bg-red-50 border border-red-200 rounded-lg p-6 text-center">
          <p className="text-red-800 font-medium mb-4">{error || 'Brand not found'}</p>
          <Link
            to="/portal"
            className="inline-flex items-center gap-2 text-blue-600 hover:text-blue-700 font-medium"
          >
            <ArrowLeft className="w-4 h-4" />
            Back to Brands
          </Link>
        </div>
      </div>
    );
  }

  return (
    <>
      <BusinessNav />
      <div className="max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8 py-8">
        <div className="mb-6">
          <Link
            to="/portal"
            className="inline-flex items-center gap-2 text-slate-600 hover:text-slate-900 font-medium transition-colors"
          >
            <ArrowLeft className="w-4 h-4" />
            Back to Brands
          </Link>
        </div>

      <div className="bg-white rounded-xl shadow-sm border border-slate-200 p-8 mb-8">
        <div className="flex items-start justify-between mb-6">
          <div>
            <div className="flex items-center gap-3 mb-3">
              <div className="w-12 h-12 bg-blue-100 rounded-lg flex items-center justify-center">
                <Sparkles className="w-6 h-6 text-blue-600" />
              </div>
              <h1 className="text-4xl font-bold text-slate-900">{brand.name}</h1>
            </div>
            {brand.description && (
              <p className="text-lg text-slate-600 max-w-3xl">{brand.description}</p>
            )}
          </div>
        </div>

        <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4 gap-6 mt-8">
          <div className="bg-blue-50 rounded-lg p-6">
            <div className="flex items-center gap-3 mb-2">
              <Clock className="w-5 h-5 text-blue-600" />
              <span className="text-sm font-medium text-slate-600">Protocols</span>
            </div>
            <p className="text-3xl font-bold text-slate-900">{protocols.length}</p>
          </div>

          <div className="bg-green-50 rounded-lg p-6">
            <div className="flex items-center gap-3 mb-2">
              <Package className="w-5 h-5 text-green-600" />
              <span className="text-sm font-medium text-slate-600">PRO Products</span>
            </div>
            <p className="text-3xl font-bold text-slate-900">{proProducts.length}</p>
          </div>

          <div className="bg-orange-50 rounded-lg p-6">
            <div className="flex items-center gap-3 mb-2">
              <ShoppingBag className="w-5 h-5 text-orange-600" />
              <span className="text-sm font-medium text-slate-600">Retail Products</span>
            </div>
            <p className="text-3xl font-bold text-slate-900">{retailProducts.length}</p>
          </div>

          <div className="bg-purple-50 rounded-lg p-6">
            <div className="flex items-center gap-3 mb-2">
              <Calendar className="w-5 h-5 text-purple-600" />
              <span className="text-sm font-medium text-slate-600">Marketing Events</span>
            </div>
            <p className="text-3xl font-bold text-slate-900">{marketingItems.length}</p>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div className="flex gap-4 mt-8">
          <button
            onClick={() => navigate(`/portal/plans/new?brand=${brand?.id}`)}
            className="flex items-center gap-2 px-6 py-3 bg-blue-600 text-white font-semibold rounded-lg hover:bg-blue-700 transition-colors"
          >
            <TrendingUp className="w-5 h-5" />
            Upload Menu & See Brand Fit
          </button>
          <Link
            to="/portal"
            className="flex items-center gap-2 px-6 py-3 bg-white text-slate-700 font-semibold rounded-lg border border-slate-300 hover:bg-slate-50 transition-colors"
          >
            Explore Other Brands
          </Link>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div className="grid md:grid-cols-2 gap-8 mb-8">
        <div className="bg-white rounded-xl shadow-sm border border-slate-200 p-6">
          <div className="flex items-center gap-3 mb-6">
            <Clock className="w-6 h-6 text-blue-600" />
            <h2 className="text-2xl font-bold text-slate-900">Protocols</h2>
          </div>
          {protocols.length === 0 ? (
            <div className="bg-blue-50 rounded-lg p-6 border border-blue-200">
              <p className="text-slate-700 mb-2 font-medium">No protocols visible</p>
              <p className="text-sm text-slate-600">
                Brand content may not be published yet, or database policies may be restricting access.
              </p>
            </div>
          ) : (
            <div className="space-y-3 max-h-96 overflow-y-auto">
              {protocols.map((protocol) => (
                <div
                  key={protocol.id}
                  className="p-4 bg-slate-50 rounded-lg border border-slate-200 hover:border-blue-300 transition-colors"
                >
                  <div className="flex items-start justify-between mb-2">
                    <h3 className="font-semibold text-slate-900">{protocol.protocol_name}</h3>
                    {protocol.duration_minutes && (
                      <span className="text-sm text-slate-600 bg-white px-2 py-1 rounded">
                        {protocol.duration_minutes} min
                      </span>
                    )}
                  </div>
                  {protocol.description && (
                    <p className="text-sm text-slate-600 line-clamp-2">{protocol.description}</p>
                  )}
                </div>
              ))}
            </div>
          )}
        </div>

        <div className="bg-white rounded-xl shadow-sm border border-slate-200 p-6">
          <div className="flex items-center gap-3 mb-6">
            <Calendar className="w-6 h-6 text-purple-600" />
            <h2 className="text-2xl font-bold text-slate-900">Marketing & Education</h2>
          </div>
          {marketingItems.length === 0 ? (
            <div className="bg-purple-50 rounded-lg p-6 border border-purple-200">
              <p className="text-slate-700 mb-2 font-medium">No marketing events visible</p>
              <p className="text-sm text-slate-600">
                Marketing calendar may not have events, or database policies may be restricting access.
              </p>
            </div>
          ) : (
            <div className="space-y-3 max-h-96 overflow-y-auto">
              {marketingItems.map((item) => (
                <div
                  key={item.id}
                  className="p-4 bg-purple-50 rounded-lg border border-purple-200"
                >
                  <div className="flex items-start justify-between mb-2">
                    <h3 className="font-semibold text-slate-900">{item.event_name}</h3>
                    {item.event_type && (
                      <span className="text-xs text-purple-700 bg-purple-100 px-2 py-1 rounded">
                        {item.event_type}
                      </span>
                    )}
                  </div>
                  {(item.start_date || item.end_date) && (
                    <p className="text-sm text-slate-600 mb-1">
                      {formatDate(item.start_date)}
                      {item.end_date && ` - ${formatDate(item.end_date)}`}
                    </p>
                  )}
                  {item.description && (
                    <p className="text-sm text-slate-600 line-clamp-2">{item.description}</p>
                  )}
                </div>
              ))}
            </div>
          )}
        </div>
      </div>

      <div className="bg-white rounded-xl shadow-sm border border-slate-200 p-6">
        <div className="flex items-center gap-3 mb-6">
          <Package className="w-6 h-6 text-green-600" />
          <h2 className="text-2xl font-bold text-slate-900">Products</h2>
        </div>

        <div className="grid md:grid-cols-2 gap-8">
          <div>
            <h3 className="text-lg font-semibold text-slate-900 mb-4 flex items-center gap-2">
              <Package className="w-5 h-5 text-green-600" />
              PRO Products ({proProducts.length})
            </h3>
            {proProducts.length === 0 ? (
              <div className="bg-green-50 rounded-lg p-4 border border-green-200">
                <p className="text-slate-700 text-sm mb-1 font-medium">No PRO products visible</p>
                <p className="text-xs text-slate-600">Content may not be published or accessible.</p>
              </div>
            ) : (
              <div className="space-y-2 max-h-96 overflow-y-auto">
                {proProducts.map((product) => (
                  <div
                    key={product.id}
                    className="p-3 bg-green-50 rounded-lg border border-green-200"
                  >
                    <div className="flex items-start justify-between">
                      <div className="flex-1">
                        <h4 className="font-medium text-slate-900">{product.product_name}</h4>
                        <div className="flex items-center gap-3 mt-1">
                          {product.size && (
                            <span className="text-sm text-slate-600">{product.size}</span>
                          )}
                          {product.category && (
                            <span className="text-xs text-green-700 bg-green-100 px-2 py-0.5 rounded">
                              {product.category}
                            </span>
                          )}
                        </div>
                      </div>
                      {product.unit_cost !== null && (
                        <span className="text-sm font-semibold text-slate-900 ml-2">
                          {formatCurrency(product.unit_cost)}
                        </span>
                      )}
                    </div>
                  </div>
                ))}
              </div>
            )}
          </div>

          <div>
            <h3 className="text-lg font-semibold text-slate-900 mb-4 flex items-center gap-2">
              <ShoppingBag className="w-5 h-5 text-orange-600" />
              Retail Products ({retailProducts.length})
            </h3>
            {retailProducts.length === 0 ? (
              <div className="bg-orange-50 rounded-lg p-4 border border-orange-200">
                <p className="text-slate-700 text-sm mb-1 font-medium">No retail products visible</p>
                <p className="text-xs text-slate-600">Content may not be published or accessible.</p>
              </div>
            ) : (
              <div className="space-y-2 max-h-96 overflow-y-auto">
                {retailProducts.map((product) => (
                  <div
                    key={product.id}
                    className="p-3 bg-orange-50 rounded-lg border border-orange-200"
                  >
                    <div className="flex items-start justify-between">
                      <div className="flex-1">
                        <h4 className="font-medium text-slate-900">{product.product_name}</h4>
                        <div className="flex items-center gap-3 mt-1">
                          {product.size && (
                            <span className="text-sm text-slate-600">{product.size}</span>
                          )}
                          {product.category && (
                            <span className="text-xs text-orange-700 bg-orange-100 px-2 py-0.5 rounded">
                              {product.category}
                            </span>
                          )}
                        </div>
                      </div>
                      {product.retail_price !== null && (
                        <span className="text-sm font-semibold text-slate-900 ml-2">
                          {formatCurrency(product.retail_price)}
                        </span>
                      )}
                    </div>
                  </div>
                ))}
              </div>
            )}
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div className="mt-8 bg-blue-600 rounded-xl p-8 text-center">
        <h2 className="text-2xl font-bold text-white mb-3">
          Ready to See How {brand.name} Fits Your Menu?
        </h2>
        <p className="text-blue-100 mb-6 max-w-2xl mx-auto">
          Upload your service menu and get personalized recommendations, gap analysis,
          and implementation support tailored to your business.
        </p>
        <button
          onClick={() => navigate(`/portal/plans/new?brand=${brand.id}`)}
          className="inline-flex items-center gap-2 px-8 py-4 bg-white text-blue-600 font-semibold rounded-lg hover:bg-blue-50 transition-colors"
        >
          <TrendingUp className="w-5 h-5" />
          Upload Menu & See Brand Fit
        </button>
      </div>
      </div>
    </>
  );
}
```

### FILE: src/pages/business/Dashboard.tsx (144 lines)

```tsx
import { useEffect, useState } from 'react';
import { Link } from 'react-router-dom';
import { FileText, Plus, TrendingUp, Package, Sparkles } from 'lucide-react';
import { useAuth } from '../../lib/auth';
import { supabase } from '../../lib/supabase';
import BusinessNav from '../../components/BusinessNav';

export default function Dashboard() {
  const { profile, user } = useAuth();
  const [planCount, setPlanCount] = useState(0);
  const [protocolCount, setProtocolCount] = useState(0);
  const [productCount, setProductCount] = useState(0);

  useEffect(() => {
    fetchCounts();
  }, [user]);

  const fetchCounts = async () => {
    if (!user) return;

    const [plansRes, protocolsRes, productsRes] = await Promise.all([
      supabase
        .from('plans')
        .select('id', { count: 'exact', head: true })
        .eq('business_user_id', user.id),
      supabase
        .from('canonical_protocols')
        .select('id', { count: 'exact', head: true })
        .eq('brand_id', '00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001'),
      supabase
        .from('pro_products')
        .select('id', { count: 'exact', head: true })
        .eq('brand_id', '00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001'),
    ]);

    setPlanCount(plansRes.count || 0);
    setProtocolCount(protocolsRes.count || 0);
    setProductCount(productsRes.count || 0);
  };

  return (
    <>
      <BusinessNav />
      <div className="max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8 py-8 space-y-8">
        <div>
          <h1 className="text-3xl font-bold text-gray-900 mb-2">
            Welcome back, {profile?.spa_name || 'Partner'}!
          </h1>
          <p className="text-gray-600">
            Manage your plans and explore professional brands
          </p>
        </div>

      <div className="grid md:grid-cols-3 gap-6">
        <div className="bg-white rounded-lg border border-gray-200 p-6">
          <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-4">
            <div className="w-12 h-12 bg-blue-100 rounded-lg flex items-center justify-center">
              <FileText className="w-6 h-6 text-blue-600" />
            </div>
            <span className="text-2xl font-bold text-gray-900">{planCount}</span>
          </div>
          <h3 className="font-medium text-gray-900 mb-1">My Plans</h3>
          <p className="text-sm text-gray-600">Implementation plans created</p>
        </div>

        <div className="bg-white rounded-lg border border-gray-200 p-6">
          <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-4">
            <div className="w-12 h-12 bg-green-100 rounded-lg flex items-center justify-center">
              <TrendingUp className="w-6 h-6 text-green-600" />
            </div>
            <span className="text-2xl font-bold text-gray-900">{protocolCount}</span>
          </div>
          <h3 className="font-medium text-gray-900 mb-1">Protocols</h3>
          <p className="text-sm text-gray-600">Available to explore</p>
        </div>

        <div className="bg-white rounded-lg border border-gray-200 p-6">
          <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-4">
            <div className="w-12 h-12 bg-orange-100 rounded-lg flex items-center justify-center">
              <Package className="w-6 h-6 text-orange-600" />
            </div>
            <span className="text-2xl font-bold text-gray-900">{productCount}</span>
          </div>
          <h3 className="font-medium text-gray-900 mb-1">Products</h3>
          <p className="text-sm text-gray-600">Professional products</p>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div className="bg-gradient-to-r from-blue-600 to-blue-700 rounded-lg p-8 text-white">
        <div className="flex items-start justify-between">
          <div className="flex-1">
            <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mb-4">
              <Sparkles className="w-6 h-6" />
              <h2 className="text-2xl font-bold">Create Your First Plan</h2>
            </div>
            <p className="text-blue-100 mb-6 max-w-2xl">
              Upload your service menu and get instant insights on brand fit, protocol matches,
              gaps, retail opportunities, and a customized opening order.
            </p>
            <Link
              to="/portal/plans/new"
              className="inline-flex items-center gap-2 px-6 py-3 bg-white text-blue-600 rounded-lg hover:bg-blue-50 transition-colors font-medium"
            >
              <Plus className="w-5 h-5" />
              Upload Menu & See Brand Fit
            </Link>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div>
        <h2 className="text-xl font-bold text-gray-900 mb-4">Quick Actions</h2>
        <div className="grid md:grid-cols-2 gap-4">
          <Link
            to="/portal"
            className="flex items-center gap-4 p-6 bg-white rounded-lg border border-gray-200 hover:shadow-md transition-shadow"
          >
            <div className="w-12 h-12 bg-blue-100 rounded-lg flex items-center justify-center flex-shrink-0">
              <Sparkles className="w-6 h-6 text-blue-600" />
            </div>
            <div>
              <h3 className="font-medium text-gray-900 mb-1">Explore Brands</h3>
              <p className="text-sm text-gray-600">Browse Naturopathica and more</p>
            </div>
          </Link>

          <Link
            to="/portal/plans"
            className="flex items-center gap-4 p-6 bg-white rounded-lg border border-gray-200 hover:shadow-md transition-shadow"
          >
            <div className="w-12 h-12 bg-green-100 rounded-lg flex items-center justify-center flex-shrink-0">
              <FileText className="w-6 h-6 text-green-600" />
            </div>
            <div>
              <h3 className="font-medium text-gray-900 mb-1">View My Plans</h3>
              <p className="text-sm text-gray-600">Access saved implementation plans</p>
            </div>
          </Link>
        </div>
      </div>
      </div>
    </>
  );
}
```
