### FILE: src/pages/spa/Dashboard.tsx (203 lines)

```tsx
import { useEffect, useState } from 'react';
import { Link } from 'react-router-dom';
import { Plus, FileText, Clock, CheckCircle, ArrowRight } from 'lucide-react';
import { useAuth } from '../../lib/auth';
import { supabase } from '../../lib/supabase';

interface Submission {
  id: string;
  spa_name: string;
  submission_status: string;
  menu_uploaded: boolean;
  analysis_completed: boolean;
  plan_generated: boolean;
  created_at: string;
  updated_at: string;
}

export default function Dashboard() {
  const { profile } = useAuth();
  const [submissions, setSubmissions] = useState<Submission[]>([]);
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);

  useEffect(() => {
    loadSubmissions();
  }, []);

  const loadSubmissions = async () => {
    try {
      const { data, error } = await supabase
        .from('plan_submissions')
        .select('*')
        .order('updated_at', { ascending: false })
        .limit(10);

      if (error) throw error;
      setSubmissions(data || []);
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Error loading submissions:', error);
    } finally {
      setLoading(false);
    }
  };

  const draftSubmissions = submissions.filter(s => s.submission_status === 'draft');
  const recentSubmission = submissions[0];

  const getStatusColor = (status: string) => {
    const colors: Record<string, string> = {
      draft: 'bg-natura-cream text-natura-warm-gray',
      submitted: 'bg-natura-navy bg-opacity-10 text-natura-navy',
      under_review: 'bg-natura-cream text-natura-navy',
      approved: 'bg-natura-navy bg-opacity-20 text-natura-navy',
      completed: 'bg-natura-navy bg-opacity-20 text-natura-navy'
    };
    return colors[status] || colors.draft;
  };

  const getStatusIcon = (status: string) => {
    if (status === 'completed' || status === 'approved') return <CheckCircle className="w-4 h-4" />;
    return <Clock className="w-4 h-4" />;
  };

  if (loading) {
    return (
      <div className="flex items-center justify-center py-12">
        <div className="text-center">
          <div className="w-12 h-12 border-4 border-natura-navy border-t-transparent rounded-full animate-spin mx-auto mb-4"></div>
          <p className="text-brand-text-muted">Loading dashboard...</p>
        </div>
      </div>
    );
  }

  return (
    <div className="space-y-8">
      <div className="mb-8">
        <h1 className="text-3xl font-semibold text-brand-text mb-2 tracking-wide">
          Welcome back, {profile?.spa_name || 'there'}
        </h1>
        <p className="text-brand-text-muted">
          Your partnership with Naturopathica — everything in one place.
        </p>
      </div>

      <div className="grid md:grid-cols-3 gap-6">
        <div className="bg-white rounded-lg border border-brand-border shadow-sm p-6">
          <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-2">
            <span className="text-sm font-medium text-brand-text-muted">Total Plans</span>
            <FileText className="w-5 h-5 text-natura-navy" />
          </div>
          <div className="text-3xl font-bold text-brand-text">{submissions.length}</div>
        </div>

        <div className="bg-white rounded-lg border border-brand-border shadow-sm p-6">
          <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-2">
            <span className="text-sm font-medium text-brand-text-muted">In Progress</span>
            <Clock className="w-5 h-5 text-natura-navy" />
          </div>
          <div className="text-3xl font-bold text-brand-text">{draftSubmissions.length}</div>
        </div>

        <div className="bg-white rounded-lg border border-brand-border shadow-sm p-6">
          <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-2">
            <span className="text-sm font-medium text-brand-text-muted">Completed</span>
            <CheckCircle className="w-5 h-5 text-natura-navy" />
          </div>
          <div className="text-3xl font-bold text-brand-text">
            {submissions.filter(s => s.submission_status === 'completed').length}
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      {recentSubmission && recentSubmission.submission_status === 'draft' && (
        <div className="bg-natura-navy bg-opacity-10 rounded-lg p-8 border border-natura-navy border-opacity-20">
          <div className="flex items-start justify-between">
            <div>
              <h2 className="text-xl font-semibold text-brand-text mb-2 tracking-wide">
                Continue Your Plan
              </h2>
              <p className="text-brand-text-muted mb-4">
                You have a draft plan in progress for {recentSubmission.spa_name}
              </p>
              <div className="flex items-center gap-3 text-sm text-brand-text-muted mb-6">
                <span className={`px-2 py-1 rounded-full font-medium ${getStatusColor(recentSubmission.submission_status)} flex items-center gap-1`}>
                  {getStatusIcon(recentSubmission.submission_status)}
                  {recentSubmission.submission_status}
                </span>
                <span>Last updated: {new Date(recentSubmission.updated_at).toLocaleDateString()}</span>
              </div>
              <Link
                to={`/plans/${recentSubmission.id}`}
                className="inline-flex items-center gap-2 px-6 py-3 bg-natura-navy text-white text-sm font-medium tracking-wide uppercase rounded-lg hover:bg-natura-navy-dark transition-colors"
              >
                Continue Plan
                <ArrowRight className="w-5 h-5" />
              </Link>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      )}

      <div className="bg-white rounded-lg border border-brand-border shadow-sm">
        <div className="p-6 border-b border-brand-border flex items-center justify-between">
          <h2 className="text-xl font-semibold text-brand-text tracking-wide">Your Plans</h2>
          <Link
            to="/spa/plan/new"
            className="px-6 py-3 bg-natura-navy text-white text-sm font-medium tracking-wide uppercase rounded-lg hover:bg-natura-navy-dark transition-colors flex items-center gap-2"
          >
            <Plus className="w-4 h-4" />
            New Plan
          </Link>
        </div>

        {submissions.length === 0 ? (
          <div className="p-12 text-center">
            <FileText className="w-12 h-12 text-brand-border mx-auto mb-4" />
            <h3 className="text-xl font-semibold text-brand-text mb-2 tracking-wide">No plans yet</h3>
            <p className="text-brand-text-muted mb-6">
              Create your first implementation plan to get started
            </p>
            <Link
              to="/spa/plan/new"
              className="inline-flex items-center gap-2 px-6 py-3 bg-natura-navy text-white text-sm font-medium tracking-wide uppercase rounded-lg hover:bg-natura-navy-dark transition-colors"
            >
              <Plus className="w-5 h-5" />
              Create First Plan
            </Link>
          </div>
        ) : (
          <div className="divide-y divide-brand-border">
            {submissions.map((submission) => (
              <Link
                key={submission.id}
                to={`/plans/${submission.id}`}
                className="block p-6 hover:bg-natura-cream hover:bg-opacity-50 transition-colors"
              >
                <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
                  <div className="flex-1">
                    <h3 className="text-lg font-semibold text-brand-text mb-2 tracking-wide">{submission.spa_name}</h3>
                    <div className="flex items-center gap-3 text-sm text-brand-text-muted">
                      <span className={`px-2 py-1 rounded-full font-medium ${getStatusColor(submission.submission_status)} flex items-center gap-1`}>
                        {getStatusIcon(submission.submission_status)}
                        {submission.submission_status.replace('_', ' ')}
                      </span>
                      <span>Updated {new Date(submission.updated_at).toLocaleDateString()}</span>
                    </div>
                    {submission.menu_uploaded && (
                      <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mt-2 text-xs text-natura-navy">
                        <CheckCircle className="w-3 h-3" />
                        Menu uploaded
                      </div>
                    )}
                  </div>
                  <ArrowRight className="w-5 h-5 text-brand-text-muted" />
                </div>
              </Link>
            ))}
          </div>
        )}
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

```

```tsx
import { Link } from 'react-router-dom';
import { ArrowRight, CheckCircle, Sparkles, TrendingUp, Package } from 'lucide-react';

export default function Home() {
  return (
    <div className="space-y-16">
      <section className="text-center py-16">
        <h1 className="text-5xl font-bold text-slate-900 mb-6">
          Transform Your Spa with<br />Naturopathica
        </h1>
        <p className="text-xl text-slate-600 mb-8 max-w-2xl mx-auto">
          Get a personalized implementation plan tailored to your menu, budget, and goals.
          Discover service gaps, retail opportunities, and seamless onboarding support.
        </p>
        <div className="flex items-center justify-center gap-4">
          <Link
            to="/spa/signup"
            className="px-8 py-4 bg-blue-600 text-white text-lg font-semibold rounded-lg hover:bg-blue-700 flex items-center gap-2 shadow-lg hover:shadow-xl transition-all"
          >
            Create Your Plan
            <ArrowRight className="w-5 h-5" />
          </Link>
          <Link
            to="/spa/login"
            className="px-8 py-4 border-2 border-slate-300 text-slate-700 text-lg font-semibold rounded-lg hover:border-slate-400 hover:bg-slate-50 transition-all"
          >
            Log In
          </Link>
        </div>
      </section>

      <section className="grid md:grid-cols-3 gap-8">
        <div className="bg-white rounded-xl p-8 border border-slate-200 shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow">
          <div className="w-12 h-12 bg-blue-100 rounded-lg flex items-center justify-center mb-4">
            <Sparkles className="w-6 h-6 text-blue-600" />
          </div>
          <h3 className="text-xl font-semibold text-slate-900 mb-3">AI-Powered Analysis</h3>
          <p className="text-slate-600">
            Upload your menu and get instant analysis of service gaps, protocol mappings, and growth opportunities.
          </p>
        </div>

        <div className="bg-white rounded-xl p-8 border border-slate-200 shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow">
          <div className="w-12 h-12 bg-green-100 rounded-lg flex items-center justify-center mb-4">
            <TrendingUp className="w-6 h-6 text-green-600" />
          </div>
          <h3 className="text-xl font-semibold text-slate-900 mb-3">Revenue Projections</h3>
          <p className="text-slate-600">
            See estimated revenue impact from new services and retail attach opportunities with data-backed projections.
          </p>
        </div>

        <div className="bg-white rounded-xl p-8 border border-slate-200 shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow">
          <div className="w-12 h-12 bg-orange-100 rounded-lg flex items-center justify-center mb-4">
            <Package className="w-6 h-6 text-orange-600" />
          </div>
          <h3 className="text-xl font-semibold text-slate-900 mb-3">Opening Order</h3>
          <p className="text-slate-600">
            Get a customized product list with quantities based on your menu, ensuring you have everything to launch.
          </p>
        </div>
      </section>

      <section className="bg-gradient-to-br from-blue-50 to-blue-100 rounded-2xl p-12">
        <h2 className="text-3xl font-bold text-slate-900 mb-6 text-center">
          What's Included in Your Plan
        </h2>
        <div className="grid md:grid-cols-2 gap-6 max-w-4xl mx-auto">
          {[
            'Menu validation & service-protocol mapping',
            'Service gap analysis with recommendations',
            'Phased 30/60/90-day implementation roadmap',
            'Opening order with backbar and retail products',
            'Retail attach recommendations per service',
            'Training requirements and timelines',
            'Revenue projections and ROI estimates',
            'Ongoing AI Concierge support'
          ].map((feature, index) => (
            <div key={index} className="flex items-start gap-3">
              <CheckCircle className="w-5 h-5 text-green-600 flex-shrink-0 mt-0.5" />
              <span className="text-slate-700">{feature}</span>
            </div>
          ))}
        </div>
      </section>

      <section className="text-center py-12">
        <h2 className="text-3xl font-bold text-slate-900 mb-4">
          Ready to Get Started?
        </h2>
        <p className="text-lg text-slate-600 mb-8">
          Create your free account and upload your menu in minutes.
        </p>
        <Link
          to="/spa/signup"
          className="inline-flex items-center gap-2 px-8 py-4 bg-blue-600 text-white text-lg font-semibold rounded-lg hover:bg-blue-700 shadow-lg hover:shadow-xl transition-all"
        >
          Get Started Now
          <ArrowRight className="w-5 h-5" />
        </Link>
      </section>
    </div>
  );
}
```

### FILE: src/pages/spa/Login.tsx (118 lines)

```tsx
import { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
import { Link, useNavigate } from 'react-router-dom';
import { LogIn, AlertCircle, Home } from 'lucide-react';
import { useAuth } from '../../lib/auth';

export default function Login() {
  const [email, setEmail] = useState('');
  const [password, setPassword] = useState('');
  const [error, setError] = useState('');
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);
  const { signIn, user, profile, loading: authLoading } = useAuth();
  const navigate = useNavigate();

  useEffect(() => {
    if (!authLoading && user && profile) {
      if (profile.role === 'spa_user') {
        navigate('/spa/dashboard', { replace: true });
      }
    }
  }, [user, profile, authLoading, navigate]);

  const handleSubmit = async (e: React.FormEvent) => {
    e.preventDefault();
    setError('');
    setLoading(true);

    const { error } = await signIn(email, password);

    if (error) {
      setError(error.message);
      setLoading(false);
    } else {
      navigate('/spa/dashboard', { replace: true });
    }
  };

  return (
    <div className="max-w-md mx-auto py-12">
      <Link
        to="/"
        className="flex items-center gap-2 text-brand-text-muted hover:text-brand-text mb-6 transition-colors"
      >
        <Home className="w-4 h-4" />
        <span className="text-sm">Back to Home</span>
      </Link>
      <div className="bg-white rounded-lg shadow-sm p-8 border border-brand-border">
        <div className="flex items-center justify-center mb-6">
          <div className="w-12 h-12 bg-natura-navy rounded-lg flex items-center justify-center">
            <LogIn className="w-6 h-6 text-white" />
          </div>
        </div>

        <h1 className="text-2xl font-semibold text-center text-brand-text mb-2 tracking-wide">
          Welcome Back
        </h1>
        <p className="text-center text-brand-text-muted mb-6">
          Log in to access your plans and dashboard
        </p>

        {error && (
          <div className="mb-4 p-3 bg-red-50 border border-red-200 rounded-lg flex items-start gap-2">
            <AlertCircle className="w-5 h-5 text-red-600 flex-shrink-0 mt-0.5" />
            <p className="text-sm text-red-700">{error}</p>
          </div>
        )}

        <form onSubmit={handleSubmit} className="space-y-4">
          <div>
            <label htmlFor="email" className="block text-sm font-medium text-brand-text mb-2">
              Email Address
            </label>
            <input
              id="email"
              type="email"
              value={email}
              onChange={(e) => setEmail(e.target.value)}
              required
              className="w-full px-4 py-2 border border-brand-border rounded-lg focus:ring-2 focus:ring-natura-navy focus:border-natura-navy"
              placeholder="you@spa.com"
            />
          </div>

          <div>
            <label htmlFor="password" className="block text-sm font-medium text-brand-text mb-2">
              Password
            </label>
            <input
              id="password"
              type="password"
              value={password}
              onChange={(e) => setPassword(e.target.value)}
              required
              className="w-full px-4 py-2 border border-brand-border rounded-lg focus:ring-2 focus:ring-natura-navy focus:border-natura-navy"
              placeholder="••••••••"
            />
          </div>

          <button
            type="submit"
            disabled={loading}
            className="w-full py-3 bg-natura-navy text-white font-medium tracking-wide uppercase rounded-lg hover:bg-natura-navy-dark disabled:bg-natura-warm-gray disabled:cursor-not-allowed transition-colors"
          >
            {loading ? 'Logging in...' : 'Log In'}
          </button>
        </form>

        <div className="mt-6 text-center">
          <p className="text-sm text-brand-text-muted">
            Don't have an account?{' '}
            <Link to="/spa/signup" className="text-natura-navy hover:text-natura-navy-dark font-medium">
              Sign up
            </Link>
          </p>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

```

### FILE: src/pages/spa/PlanDetail.tsx (455 lines)

```tsx
import { useEffect, useState } from 'react';
import { useParams, Link } from 'react-router-dom';
import {
  ArrowLeft,
  CheckCircle,
  AlertCircle,
  TrendingUp,
  Package,
  FileText,
  Loader
} from 'lucide-react';
import { supabase } from '../../lib/supabase';

interface Submission {
  id: string;
  spa_name: string;
  spa_type: string;
  submission_status: string;
  analysis_completed: boolean;
  plan_generated: boolean;
  created_at: string;
  updated_at: string;
}

interface PlanOutput {
  id: string;
  output_data: {
    summary: {
      totalServices: number;
      mappedServices: number;
      identifiedGaps: number;
      retailOpportunities: number;
      openingOrderTotal: number;
    };
    services: Array<{
      service_name: string;
      duration_minutes: number;
      price: number;
      category: string;
    }>;
    mappings: Array<{
      serviceName: string;
      solutionType: string;
      solutionReference: string;
      matchType: string;
      confidence: string;
      rationale: string;
    }>;
    gaps: Array<{
      gap_category: string;
      gap_description: string;
      priority_level: string;
      rationale: string;
    }>;
    retailRecommendations: Array<{
      serviceName: string;
      productName: string;
      rationale: string;
      strategy: string;
    }>;
    openingOrder: Array<{
      productName: string;
      quantity: number;
      unitPrice: number;
      totalCost: number;
    }>;
  };
}

type TabType = 'overview' | 'gaps' | 'mappings' | 'retail' | 'opening-order';

export default function PlanDetail() {
  const { id } = useParams<{ id: string }>();
  const [submission, setSubmission] = useState<Submission | null>(null);
  const [planOutput, setPlanOutput] = useState<PlanOutput | null>(null);
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
  const [error, setError] = useState('');
  const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = useState<TabType>('overview');

  useEffect(() => {
    if (id) {
      loadPlanData(id);
    }
  }, [id]);

  const loadPlanData = async (submissionId: string) => {
    try {
      const { data: submissionData, error: submissionError } = await supabase
        .from('plan_submissions')
        .select('*')
        .eq('id', submissionId)
        .maybeSingle();

      if (submissionError || !submissionData) {
        setError('Plan not found');
        setLoading(false);
        return;
      }

      setSubmission(submissionData);

      if (submissionData.plan_output_id) {
        const { data: outputData, error: outputError } = await supabase
          .from('plan_outputs')
          .select('*')
          .eq('id', submissionData.plan_output_id)
          .maybeSingle();

        if (outputError) {
          console.error('Error loading plan output:', outputError);
        } else if (outputData) {
          setPlanOutput(outputData);
        }
      }
    } catch (err) {
      setError('Failed to load plan');
      console.error(err);
    } finally {
      setLoading(false);
    }
  };

  const getStatusBadge = (status: string) => {
    const statusConfig: Record<
      string,
      { bg: string; text: string; icon: JSX.Element }
    > = {
      draft: {
        bg: 'bg-slate-100',
        text: 'text-slate-700',
        icon: <AlertCircle className="w-4 h-4" />
      },
      under_review: {
        bg: 'bg-blue-100',
        text: 'text-blue-700',
        icon: <Loader className="w-4 h-4 animate-spin" />
      },
      completed: {
        bg: 'bg-green-100',
        text: 'text-green-700',
        icon: <CheckCircle className="w-4 h-4" />
      }
    };

    const config = statusConfig[status] || statusConfig.draft;

    return (
      <span
        className={`inline-flex items-center gap-2 px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-sm font-medium ${config.bg} ${config.text}`}
      >
        {config.icon}
        {status.replace('_', ' ')}
      </span>
    );
  };

  if (loading) {
    return (
      <div className="flex items-center justify-center py-12">
        <div className="text-center">
          <Loader className="w-12 h-12 text-blue-600 animate-spin mx-auto mb-4" />
          <p className="text-slate-600">Loading plan...</p>
        </div>
      </div>
    );
  }

  if (error || !submission) {
    return (
      <div className="text-center py-12">
        <AlertCircle className="w-12 h-12 text-red-500 mx-auto mb-4" />
        <h2 className="text-2xl font-bold text-slate-900 mb-2">Plan Not Found</h2>
        <p className="text-slate-600 mb-6">{error || 'This plan does not exist or you do not have access to it.'}</p>
        <Link
          to="/spa/dashboard"
          className="inline-flex items-center gap-2 px-6 py-3 bg-blue-600 text-white font-semibold rounded-lg hover:bg-blue-700"
        >
          <ArrowLeft className="w-5 h-5" />
          Back to Dashboard
        </Link>
      </div>
    );
  }

  const tabs: Array<{ id: TabType; label: string; icon: JSX.Element }> = [
    { id: 'overview', label: 'Overview', icon: <FileText className="w-4 h-4" /> },
    { id: 'gaps', label: 'Service Gaps', icon: <AlertCircle className="w-4 h-4" /> },
    { id: 'mappings', label: 'Protocol Mappings', icon: <CheckCircle className="w-4 h-4" /> },
    { id: 'retail', label: 'Retail Opportunities', icon: <TrendingUp className="w-4 h-4" /> },
    { id: 'opening-order', label: 'Opening Order', icon: <Package className="w-4 h-4" /> }
  ];

  const summary = planOutput?.output_data?.summary;

  return (
    <div className="space-y-6">
      <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
        <div>
          <Link
            to="/spa/dashboard"
            className="inline-flex items-center gap-2 text-sm text-slate-600 hover:text-slate-900 mb-2"
          >
            <ArrowLeft className="w-4 h-4" />
            Back to Dashboard
          </Link>
          <h1 className="text-3xl font-bold text-slate-900 mb-2">{submission.spa_name}</h1>
          <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
            {getStatusBadge(submission.submission_status)}
            <span className="text-sm text-slate-500">
              Created {new Date(submission.created_at).toLocaleDateString()}
            </span>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      {summary && (
        <div className="grid md:grid-cols-4 gap-4">
          <div className="bg-white rounded-lg border border-slate-200 p-4">
            <div className="text-sm text-slate-600 mb-1">Total Services</div>
            <div className="text-2xl font-bold text-slate-900">{summary.totalServices}</div>
          </div>
          <div className="bg-white rounded-lg border border-slate-200 p-4">
            <div className="text-sm text-slate-600 mb-1">Mapped to Protocols</div>
            <div className="text-2xl font-bold text-blue-600">{summary.mappedServices}</div>
          </div>
          <div className="bg-white rounded-lg border border-slate-200 p-4">
            <div className="text-sm text-slate-600 mb-1">Identified Gaps</div>
            <div className="text-2xl font-bold text-orange-600">{summary.identifiedGaps}</div>
          </div>
          <div className="bg-white rounded-lg border border-slate-200 p-4">
            <div className="text-sm text-slate-600 mb-1">Retail Opportunities</div>
            <div className="text-2xl font-bold text-green-600">{summary.retailOpportunities}</div>
          </div>
        </div>
      )}

      <div className="bg-white rounded-lg border border-slate-200 overflow-hidden">
        <div className="border-b border-slate-200 flex overflow-x-auto">
          {tabs.map((tab) => (
            <button
              key={tab.id}
              onClick={() => setActiveTab(tab.id)}
              className={`flex items-center gap-2 px-6 py-4 text-sm font-medium whitespace-nowrap transition-colors ${
                activeTab === tab.id
                  ? 'border-b-2 border-blue-600 text-blue-600'
                  : 'text-slate-600 hover:text-slate-900 hover:bg-slate-50'
              }`}
            >
              {tab.icon}
              {tab.label}
            </button>
          ))}
        </div>

        <div className="p-6">
          {!planOutput ? (
            <div className="text-center py-12">
              <Loader className="w-8 h-8 text-slate-400 animate-spin mx-auto mb-4" />
              <p className="text-slate-600">Analysis in progress...</p>
            </div>
          ) : (
            <>
              {activeTab === 'overview' && (
                <div className="space-y-6">
                  <div>
                    <h3 className="text-lg font-semibold text-slate-900 mb-4">Your Services</h3>
                    <div className="space-y-2">
                      {planOutput.output_data.services.map((service, index) => (
                        <div
                          key={index}
                          className="flex items-center justify-between p-4 bg-slate-50 rounded-lg"
                        >
                          <div>
                            <div className="font-medium text-slate-900">{service.service_name}</div>
                            <div className="text-sm text-slate-600">
                              {service.duration_minutes} min • {service.category}
                            </div>
                          </div>
                          <div className="text-lg font-semibold text-slate-900">
                            ${service.price}
                          </div>
                        </div>
                      ))}
                    </div>
                  </div>
                </div>
              )}

              {activeTab === 'gaps' && (
                <div className="space-y-4">
                  <div>
                    <h3 className="text-lg font-semibold text-slate-900 mb-2">
                      Identified Service Gaps
                    </h3>
                    <p className="text-sm text-slate-600 mb-4">
                      These are opportunities to expand your service menu based on industry best
                      practices
                    </p>
                  </div>
                  {planOutput.output_data.gaps.length === 0 ? (
                    <div className="text-center py-8 text-slate-600">
                      No significant gaps identified. Your menu is well-rounded!
                    </div>
                  ) : (
                    <div className="space-y-3">
                      {planOutput.output_data.gaps.map((gap, index) => (
                        <div key={index} className="border border-slate-200 rounded-lg p-4">
                          <div className="flex items-start justify-between mb-2">
                            <div className="font-semibold text-slate-900">{gap.gap_category}</div>
                            <span
                              className={`px-2 py-1 text-xs font-semibold rounded ${
                                gap.priority_level === 'High'
                                  ? 'bg-red-100 text-red-700'
                                  : gap.priority_level === 'Medium'
                                  ? 'bg-orange-100 text-orange-700'
                                  : 'bg-blue-100 text-blue-700'
                              }`}
                            >
                              {gap.priority_level} Priority
                            </span>
                          </div>
                          <p className="text-sm text-slate-700 mb-2">{gap.gap_description}</p>
                          <p className="text-xs text-slate-600">{gap.rationale}</p>
                        </div>
                      ))}
                    </div>
                  )}
                </div>
              )}

              {activeTab === 'mappings' && (
                <div className="space-y-4">
                  <div>
                    <h3 className="text-lg font-semibold text-slate-900 mb-2">
                      Service-Protocol Mappings
                    </h3>
                    <p className="text-sm text-slate-600 mb-4">
                      How your existing services map to Naturopathica protocols
                    </p>
                  </div>
                  <div className="space-y-3">
                    {planOutput.output_data.mappings.map((mapping, index) => (
                      <div key={index} className="border border-slate-200 rounded-lg p-4">
                        <div className="flex items-start justify-between mb-2">
                          <div className="font-semibold text-slate-900">{mapping.serviceName}</div>
                          <span
                            className={`px-2 py-1 text-xs font-semibold rounded ${
                              mapping.confidence === 'High'
                                ? 'bg-green-100 text-green-700'
                                : mapping.confidence === 'Medium'
                                ? 'bg-yellow-100 text-yellow-700'
                                : 'bg-slate-100 text-slate-700'
                            }`}
                          >
                            {mapping.confidence} Confidence
                          </span>
                        </div>
                        <div className="text-sm text-slate-700 mb-2">
                          <span className="font-medium">Protocol:</span> {mapping.solutionReference}
                        </div>
                        <p className="text-xs text-slate-600">{mapping.rationale}</p>
                      </div>
                    ))}
                  </div>
                </div>
              )}

              {activeTab === 'retail' && (
                <div className="space-y-4">
                  <div>
                    <h3 className="text-lg font-semibold text-slate-900 mb-2">
                      Retail Attach Opportunities
                    </h3>
                    <p className="text-sm text-slate-600 mb-4">
                      Recommended products to promote with each service
                    </p>
                  </div>
                  <div className="space-y-3">
                    {planOutput.output_data.retailRecommendations.map((rec, index) => (
                      <div key={index} className="border border-slate-200 rounded-lg p-4">
                        <div className="font-semibold text-slate-900 mb-1">{rec.serviceName}</div>
                        <div className="text-sm text-blue-600 font-medium mb-2">
                          {rec.productName}
                        </div>
                        <p className="text-xs text-slate-700 mb-2">{rec.rationale}</p>
                        <p className="text-xs text-slate-600 italic">Strategy: {rec.strategy}</p>
                      </div>
                    ))}
                  </div>
                </div>
              )}

              {activeTab === 'opening-order' && (
                <div className="space-y-4">
                  <div>
                    <h3 className="text-lg font-semibold text-slate-900 mb-2">Opening Order</h3>
                    <p className="text-sm text-slate-600 mb-4">
                      Recommended products and quantities to launch your Naturopathica menu
                    </p>
                  </div>
                  {summary && (
                    <div className="bg-blue-50 border border-blue-200 rounded-lg p-4 mb-4">
                      <div className="text-sm text-blue-900 font-medium">Estimated Total</div>
                      <div className="text-2xl font-bold text-blue-700">
                        ${summary.openingOrderTotal.toFixed(2)}
                      </div>
                    </div>
                  )}
                  <div className="border border-slate-200 rounded-lg overflow-hidden">
                    <table className="w-full">
                      <thead className="bg-slate-50">
                        <tr>
                          <th className="px-4 py-3 text-left text-xs font-semibold text-slate-700">
                            Product
                          </th>
                          <th className="px-4 py-3 text-center text-xs font-semibold text-slate-700">
                            Quantity
                          </th>
                          <th className="px-4 py-3 text-right text-xs font-semibold text-slate-700">
                            Unit Price
                          </th>
                          <th className="px-4 py-3 text-right text-xs font-semibold text-slate-700">
                            Total
                          </th>
                        </tr>
                      </thead>
                      <tbody className="divide-y divide-slate-200">
                        {planOutput.output_data.openingOrder.map((item, index) => (
                          <tr key={index}>
                            <td className="px-4 py-3 text-sm text-slate-900">
                              {item.productName}
                            </td>
                            <td className="px-4 py-3 text-sm text-slate-700 text-center">
                              {item.quantity}
                            </td>
                            <td className="px-4 py-3 text-sm text-slate-700 text-right">
                              ${item.unitPrice?.toFixed(2) || '0.00'}
                            </td>
                            <td className="px-4 py-3 text-sm font-semibold text-slate-900 text-right">
                              ${item.totalCost?.toFixed(2) || '0.00'}
                            </td>
                          </tr>
                        ))}
                      </tbody>
                    </table>
                  </div>
                </div>
              )}
            </>
          )}
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

```

### FILE: src/pages/spa/PlanWizard.tsx (340 lines)

```tsx
import { useState } from 'react';
import { useNavigate } from 'react-router-dom';
import { ArrowRight, ArrowLeft, Upload, Loader, CheckCircle, AlertCircle } from 'lucide-react';
import { useAuth } from '../../lib/auth';
import { supabase } from '../../lib/supabase';
import { orchestratePlanGeneration } from '../../lib/planOrchestrator';

type Step = 'details' | 'menu' | 'generating';

type SpaType = 'spa' | 'medspa' | 'hybrid';

export default function PlanWizard() {
  const { user, profile } = useAuth();
  const navigate = useNavigate();
  const [currentStep, setCurrentStep] = useState<Step>('details');
  const [error, setError] = useState('');

  const [spaName, setSpaName] = useState(profile?.spa_name || '');
  const [spaType, setSpaType] = useState<SpaType>('spa');
  const [location, setLocation] = useState('');
  const [menuText, setMenuText] = useState('');
  const [isGenerating, setIsGenerating] = useState(false);

  const handleNext = () => {
    setError('');

    if (currentStep === 'details') {
      if (!spaName.trim()) {
        setError('Please enter your spa name');
        return;
      }
      setCurrentStep('menu');
    }
  };

  const handleBack = () => {
    setError('');
    if (currentStep === 'menu') {
      setCurrentStep('details');
    }
  };

  const handleGenerate = async () => {
    setError('');

    if (!menuText.trim()) {
      setError('Please enter your menu services');
      return;
    }

    if (!user) {
      setError('You must be logged in');
      return;
    }

    setIsGenerating(true);
    setCurrentStep('generating');

    try {
      const { data: submission, error: submissionError } = await supabase
        .from('plan_submissions')
        .insert({
          user_id: user.id,
          spa_name: spaName,
          spa_type: spaType,
          spa_location: location || null,
          submission_status: 'draft',
          menu_uploaded: false
        })
        .select()
        .single();

      if (submissionError || !submission) {
        throw new Error('Failed to create submission');
      }

      const result = await orchestratePlanGeneration(
        submission.id,
        menuText,
        user.id
      );

      if (!result.success) {
        throw new Error(result.error || 'Failed to generate plan');
      }

      navigate(`/spa/plans/${submission.id}`);
    } catch (err) {
      setError(err instanceof Error ? err.message : 'An error occurred');
      setIsGenerating(false);
      setCurrentStep('menu');
    }
  };

  const exampleMenu = `Signature Facial - 60 min - $150
Swedish Massage - 60 min - $120
Hot Stone Massage - 90 min - $180
Body Scrub - 45 min - $95
Manicure - 45 min - $50
Pedicure - 60 min - $65`;

  return (
    <div className="max-w-3xl mx-auto">
      <div className="mb-8">
        <h1 className="text-3xl font-bold text-slate-900 mb-2">Create Implementation Plan</h1>
        <p className="text-slate-600">
          Get a personalized analysis of your spa menu with recommendations for growth
        </p>
      </div>

      <div className="flex items-center justify-center mb-8">
        <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
          <div
            className={`flex items-center justify-center w-8 h-8 rounded-full font-semibold text-sm ${
              currentStep === 'details' || currentStep === 'menu' || currentStep === 'generating'
                ? 'bg-blue-600 text-white'
                : 'bg-slate-200 text-slate-500'
            }`}
          >
            {currentStep !== 'details' ? <CheckCircle className="w-5 h-5" /> : '1'}
          </div>
          <span
            className={`text-sm font-medium ${
              currentStep === 'details' || currentStep === 'menu' || currentStep === 'generating'
                ? 'text-slate-900'
                : 'text-slate-500'
            }`}
          >
            Spa Details
          </span>
        </div>

        <div className="w-16 h-0.5 bg-slate-200 mx-2"></div>

        <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
          <div
            className={`flex items-center justify-center w-8 h-8 rounded-full font-semibold text-sm ${
              currentStep === 'menu' || currentStep === 'generating'
                ? 'bg-blue-600 text-white'
                : 'bg-slate-200 text-slate-500'
            }`}
          >
            2
          </div>
          <span
            className={`text-sm font-medium ${
              currentStep === 'menu' || currentStep === 'generating'
                ? 'text-slate-900'
                : 'text-slate-500'
            }`}
          >
            Menu Input
          </span>
        </div>

        <div className="w-16 h-0.5 bg-slate-200 mx-2"></div>

        <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
          <div
            className={`flex items-center justify-center w-8 h-8 rounded-full font-semibold text-sm ${
              currentStep === 'generating'
                ? 'bg-blue-600 text-white'
                : 'bg-slate-200 text-slate-500'
            }`}
          >
            3
          </div>
          <span
            className={`text-sm font-medium ${
              currentStep === 'generating' ? 'text-slate-900' : 'text-slate-500'
            }`}
          >
            Analysis
          </span>
        </div>
      </div>

      {error && (
        <div className="mb-6 p-4 bg-red-50 border border-red-200 rounded-lg flex items-start gap-3">
          <AlertCircle className="w-5 h-5 text-red-600 flex-shrink-0 mt-0.5" />
          <p className="text-sm text-red-700">{error}</p>
        </div>
      )}

      {currentStep === 'details' && (
        <div className="bg-white rounded-xl border border-slate-200 p-8 shadow-sm">
          <h2 className="text-xl font-semibold text-slate-900 mb-6">Tell us about your spa</h2>

          <div className="space-y-6">
            <div>
              <label htmlFor="spaName" className="block text-sm font-medium text-slate-700 mb-2">
                Spa / Business Name
              </label>
              <input
                id="spaName"
                type="text"
                value={spaName}
                onChange={(e) => setSpaName(e.target.value)}
                className="w-full px-4 py-2 border border-slate-300 rounded-lg focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500 focus:border-blue-500"
                placeholder="Your Spa Name"
              />
            </div>

            <div>
              <label htmlFor="spaType" className="block text-sm font-medium text-slate-700 mb-2">
                Spa Type
              </label>
              <select
                id="spaType"
                value={spaType}
                onChange={(e) => setSpaType(e.target.value as SpaType)}
                className="w-full px-4 py-2 border border-slate-300 rounded-lg focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500 focus:border-blue-500"
              >
                <option value="spa">Day Spa / Resort Spa</option>
                <option value="medspa">Medical Spa</option>
                <option value="hybrid">Hybrid (Spa + MedSpa)</option>
              </select>
            </div>

            <div>
              <label htmlFor="location" className="block text-sm font-medium text-slate-700 mb-2">
                Location (Optional)
              </label>
              <input
                id="location"
                type="text"
                value={location}
                onChange={(e) => setLocation(e.target.value)}
                className="w-full px-4 py-2 border border-slate-300 rounded-lg focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500 focus:border-blue-500"
                placeholder="City, State"
              />
            </div>
          </div>

          <div className="flex justify-end mt-8">
            <button
              onClick={handleNext}
              className="px-6 py-3 bg-blue-600 text-white font-semibold rounded-lg hover:bg-blue-700 flex items-center gap-2"
            >
              Next: Add Menu
              <ArrowRight className="w-5 h-5" />
            </button>
          </div>
        </div>
      )}

      {currentStep === 'menu' && (
        <div className="bg-white rounded-xl border border-slate-200 p-8 shadow-sm">
          <h2 className="text-xl font-semibold text-slate-900 mb-2">Your Service Menu</h2>
          <p className="text-sm text-slate-600 mb-6">
            Paste your menu services in the format: Service Name - Duration min - $Price
          </p>

          <div className="space-y-6">
            <div>
              <label htmlFor="menuText" className="block text-sm font-medium text-slate-700 mb-2">
                Service Menu
              </label>
              <textarea
                id="menuText"
                value={menuText}
                onChange={(e) => setMenuText(e.target.value)}
                rows={12}
                className="w-full px-4 py-3 border border-slate-300 rounded-lg focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500 focus:border-blue-500 font-mono text-sm"
                placeholder={exampleMenu}
              />
              <p className="text-xs text-slate-500 mt-2">
                Example format: Signature Facial - 60 min - $150
              </p>
            </div>

            <div className="bg-blue-50 border border-blue-200 rounded-lg p-4">
              <div className="flex items-start gap-2">
                <Upload className="w-5 h-5 text-blue-600 flex-shrink-0 mt-0.5" />
                <div className="text-sm">
                  <p className="font-medium text-blue-900 mb-1">Quick Start</p>
                  <p className="text-blue-700">
                    Copy your menu from your website or booking system and paste it here. We'll
                    analyze it to identify protocols, gaps, and opportunities.
                  </p>
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>

          <div className="flex justify-between mt-8">
            <button
              onClick={handleBack}
              className="px-6 py-3 border border-slate-300 text-slate-700 font-semibold rounded-lg hover:bg-slate-50 flex items-center gap-2"
            >
              <ArrowLeft className="w-5 h-5" />
              Back
            </button>
            <button
              onClick={handleGenerate}
              disabled={isGenerating}
              className="px-6 py-3 bg-blue-600 text-white font-semibold rounded-lg hover:bg-blue-700 disabled:bg-blue-400 flex items-center gap-2"
            >
              Generate Plan
              <ArrowRight className="w-5 h-5" />
            </button>
          </div>
        </div>
      )}

      {currentStep === 'generating' && (
        <div className="bg-white rounded-xl border border-slate-200 p-12 shadow-sm text-center">
          <div className="flex items-center justify-center mb-6">
            <Loader className="w-16 h-16 text-blue-600 animate-spin" />
          </div>
          <h2 className="text-2xl font-semibold text-slate-900 mb-3">
            Analyzing Your Menu
          </h2>
          <p className="text-slate-600 mb-8 max-w-md mx-auto">
            We're mapping your services to protocols, identifying gaps, and generating
            recommendations. This typically takes 10-20 seconds.
          </p>
          <div className="space-y-2 text-left max-w-md mx-auto">
            <div className="flex items-center gap-3 text-sm text-slate-600">
              <CheckCircle className="w-5 h-5 text-green-600" />
              <span>Parsing menu services</span>
            </div>
            <div className="flex items-center gap-3 text-sm text-slate-600">
              <Loader className="w-5 h-5 text-blue-600 animate-spin" />
              <span>Mapping to protocols</span>
            </div>
            <div className="flex items-center gap-3 text-sm text-slate-400">
              <div className="w-5 h-5 border-2 border-slate-300 rounded-full"></div>
              <span>Analyzing service gaps</span>
            </div>
            <div className="flex items-center gap-3 text-sm text-slate-400">
              <div className="w-5 h-5 border-2 border-slate-300 rounded-full"></div>
              <span>Generating retail recommendations</span>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      )}
    </div>
  );
}
```

### FILE: src/pages/spa/Plans.tsx (172 lines)

```tsx
import { useEffect, useState } from 'react';
import { Link } from 'react-router-dom';
import { FileText, Plus, ArrowRight, Clock, CheckCircle } from 'lucide-react';
import { useAuth } from '../../lib/auth';
import { supabase } from '../../lib/supabase';

interface Submission {
  id: string;
  spa_name: string;
  submission_status: string;
  menu_uploaded: boolean;
  created_at: string;
  updated_at: string;
}

export default function Plans() {
  const [submissions, setSubmissions] = useState<Submission[]>([]);
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
  const [filter, setFilter] = useState('all');

  useEffect(() => {
    loadSubmissions();
  }, []);

  const loadSubmissions = async () => {
    try {
      const { data, error } = await supabase
        .from('plan_submissions')
        .select('*')
        .order('updated_at', { ascending: false });

      if (error) throw error;
      setSubmissions(data || []);
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Error loading submissions:', error);
    } finally {
      setLoading(false);
    }
  };

  const filteredSubmissions = filter === 'all'
    ? submissions
    : submissions.filter(s => s.submission_status === filter);

  const statusCounts = {
    all: submissions.length,
    draft: submissions.filter(s => s.submission_status === 'draft').length,
    submitted: submissions.filter(s => s.submission_status === 'submitted').length,
    approved: submissions.filter(s => s.submission_status === 'approved').length,
  };

  const getStatusColor = (status: string) => {
    const colors: Record<string, string> = {
      draft: 'bg-natura-cream text-natura-warm-gray',
      submitted: 'bg-natura-navy bg-opacity-10 text-natura-navy',
      under_review: 'bg-natura-cream text-natura-navy',
      approved: 'bg-natura-navy bg-opacity-20 text-natura-navy',
      completed: 'bg-natura-navy bg-opacity-20 text-natura-navy'
    };
    return colors[status] || colors.draft;
  };

  const getStatusIcon = (status: string) => {
    if (status === 'completed' || status === 'approved') return <CheckCircle className="w-4 h-4" />;
    return <Clock className="w-4 h-4" />;
  };

  if (loading) {
    return (
      <div className="flex items-center justify-center py-12">
        <div className="text-center">
          <div className="w-12 h-12 border-4 border-natura-navy border-t-transparent rounded-full animate-spin mx-auto mb-4"></div>
          <p className="text-brand-text-muted">Loading plans...</p>
        </div>
      </div>
    );
  }

  return (
    <div className="space-y-6">
      <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
        <div>
          <h1 className="text-3xl font-semibold text-brand-text mb-2 tracking-wide">My Plans</h1>
          <p className="text-brand-text-muted">View and manage your implementation plans</p>
        </div>
        <Link
          to="/spa/plan/new"
          className="px-6 py-3 bg-natura-navy text-white text-sm font-medium tracking-wide uppercase rounded-lg hover:bg-natura-navy-dark transition-colors flex items-center gap-2"
        >
          <Plus className="w-5 h-5" />
          New Plan
        </Link>
      </div>

      <div className="bg-white rounded-lg border border-brand-border shadow-sm">
        <div className="grid grid-cols-4 divide-x divide-brand-border">
          {[
            { key: 'all', label: 'All' },
            { key: 'draft', label: 'Draft' },
            { key: 'submitted', label: 'Submitted' },
            { key: 'approved', label: 'Approved' }
          ].map(status => (
            <button
              key={status.key}
              onClick={() => setFilter(status.key)}
              className={`px-4 py-3 text-center transition-colors ${
                filter === status.key
                  ? 'bg-natura-cream text-natura-navy'
                  : 'text-brand-text-muted hover:bg-natura-cream hover:bg-opacity-30'
              }`}
            >
              <div className="text-2xl font-bold">{statusCounts[status.key as keyof typeof statusCounts]}</div>
              <div className="text-xs font-medium mt-1">{status.label}</div>
            </button>
          ))}
        </div>
      </div>

      <div className="bg-white rounded-lg border border-brand-border shadow-sm">
        {filteredSubmissions.length === 0 ? (
          <div className="p-12 text-center">
            <FileText className="w-12 h-12 text-brand-border mx-auto mb-4" />
            <h3 className="text-lg font-semibold text-brand-text mb-2 tracking-wide">
              {filter === 'all' ? 'No plans yet' : `No ${filter} plans`}
            </h3>
            <p className="text-brand-text-muted mb-6">
              {filter === 'all'
                ? 'Create your first implementation plan to get started'
                : `You don't have any plans with status "${filter}"`
              }
            </p>
            {filter === 'all' && (
              <Link
                to="/spa/plan/new"
                className="inline-flex items-center gap-2 px-6 py-3 bg-natura-navy text-white text-sm font-medium tracking-wide uppercase rounded-lg hover:bg-natura-navy-dark transition-colors"
              >
                <Plus className="w-5 h-5" />
                Create First Plan
              </Link>
            )}
          </div>
        ) : (
          <div className="divide-y divide-brand-border">
            {filteredSubmissions.map((submission) => (
              <Link
                key={submission.id}
                to={`/plans/${submission.id}`}
                className="block p-6 hover:bg-natura-cream hover:bg-opacity-50 transition-colors"
              >
                <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
                  <div className="flex-1">
                    <h3 className="font-semibold text-brand-text mb-2 tracking-wide">{submission.spa_name}</h3>
                    <div className="flex items-center gap-3 text-sm">
                      <span className={`px-2 py-1 rounded-full font-medium ${getStatusColor(submission.submission_status)} flex items-center gap-1`}>
                        {getStatusIcon(submission.submission_status)}
                        {submission.submission_status.replace('_', ' ')}
                      </span>
                      <span className="text-brand-text-muted">
                        Updated {new Date(submission.updated_at).toLocaleDateString()}
                      </span>
                    </div>
                  </div>
                  <ArrowRight className="w-5 h-5 text-brand-text-muted" />
                </div>
              </Link>
            ))}
          </div>
        )}
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

```

```tsx
      <h1 className="text-3xl font-semibold text-brand-text mb-2 tracking-wide">
```

```tsx
        Explore 47 proven Naturopathica protocols designed for spa professionals.
```

### FILE: src/pages/spa/Signup.tsx (140 lines)

```tsx
import { useState } from 'react';
import { Link, useNavigate } from 'react-router-dom';
import { UserPlus, AlertCircle, CheckCircle, Home } from 'lucide-react';
import { useAuth } from '../../lib/auth';

export default function Signup() {
  const [email, setEmail] = useState('');
  const [password, setPassword] = useState('');
  const [spaName, setSpaName] = useState('');
  const [error, setError] = useState('');
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);
  const { signUp } = useAuth();
  const navigate = useNavigate();

  const handleSubmit = async (e: React.FormEvent) => {
    e.preventDefault();
    setError('');
    setLoading(true);

    if (password.length < 6) {
      setError('Password must be at least 6 characters');
      setLoading(false);
      return;
    }

    const { error } = await signUp(email, password, spaName, 'spa_user');

    if (error) {
      setError(error.message);
      setLoading(false);
    } else {
      navigate('/spa/dashboard');
    }
  };

  return (
    <div className="max-w-md mx-auto py-12">
      <Link
        to="/"
        className="flex items-center gap-2 text-brand-text-muted hover:text-brand-text mb-6 transition-colors"
      >
        <Home className="w-4 h-4" />
        <span className="text-sm">Back to Home</span>
      </Link>
      <div className="bg-white rounded-lg shadow-sm p-8 border border-brand-border">
        <div className="flex items-center justify-center mb-6">
          <div className="w-12 h-12 bg-natura-navy rounded-lg flex items-center justify-center">
            <UserPlus className="w-6 h-6 text-white" />
          </div>
        </div>

        <h1 className="text-2xl font-semibold text-center text-brand-text mb-2 tracking-wide">
          Create Your Account
        </h1>
        <p className="text-center text-brand-text-muted mb-6">
          Start building your Naturopathica plan today
        </p>

        {error && (
          <div className="mb-4 p-3 bg-red-50 border border-red-200 rounded-lg flex items-start gap-2">
            <AlertCircle className="w-5 h-5 text-red-600 flex-shrink-0 mt-0.5" />
            <p className="text-sm text-red-700">{error}</p>
          </div>
        )}

        <form onSubmit={handleSubmit} className="space-y-4">
          <div>
            <label htmlFor="spaName" className="block text-sm font-medium text-brand-text mb-2">
              Spa / Business Name
            </label>
            <input
              id="spaName"
              type="text"
              value={spaName}
              onChange={(e) => setSpaName(e.target.value)}
              required
              className="w-full px-4 py-2 border border-brand-border rounded-lg focus:ring-2 focus:ring-natura-navy focus:border-natura-navy"
              placeholder="Your Spa Name"
            />
          </div>

          <div>
            <label htmlFor="email" className="block text-sm font-medium text-brand-text mb-2">
              Email Address
            </label>
            <input
              id="email"
              type="email"
              value={email}
              onChange={(e) => setEmail(e.target.value)}
              required
              className="w-full px-4 py-2 border border-brand-border rounded-lg focus:ring-2 focus:ring-natura-navy focus:border-natura-navy"
              placeholder="you@spa.com"
            />
          </div>

          <div>
            <label htmlFor="password" className="block text-sm font-medium text-brand-text mb-2">
              Password
            </label>
            <input
              id="password"
              type="password"
              value={password}
              onChange={(e) => setPassword(e.target.value)}
              required
              className="w-full px-4 py-2 border border-brand-border rounded-lg focus:ring-2 focus:ring-natura-navy focus:border-natura-navy"
              placeholder="••••••••"
            />
            <p className="text-xs text-brand-text-muted mt-1">Minimum 6 characters</p>
          </div>

          <button
            type="submit"
            disabled={loading}
            className="w-full py-3 bg-natura-navy text-white font-medium tracking-wide uppercase rounded-lg hover:bg-natura-navy-dark disabled:bg-natura-warm-gray disabled:cursor-not-allowed transition-colors"
          >
            {loading ? 'Creating account...' : 'Create Account'}
          </button>
        </form>

        <div className="mt-6">
          <div className="flex items-start gap-2 text-xs text-brand-text-muted mb-4">
            <CheckCircle className="w-4 h-4 text-natura-navy flex-shrink-0 mt-0.5" />
            <p>
              By signing up, you agree to receive implementation plans and support from Naturopathica.
            </p>
          </div>

          <p className="text-sm text-brand-text-muted text-center">
            Already have an account?{' '}
            <Link to="/spa/login" className="text-natura-navy hover:text-natura-navy-dark font-medium">
              Log in
            </Link>
          </p>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

```

### FILE: supabase/migrations/20260121181900_create_naturopathica_schema.sql (383 lines)

```sql
/*
  # Naturopathica Service Mapping Platform Schema

  ## Overview
  Complete database schema for storing Naturopathica reference libraries, spa menus,
  and mapping results for the Account Manager service-mapping engine.

  ## New Tables

  ### Reference Libraries
  
  1. `canonical_protocols` - Official Naturopathica treatment protocols
    - `id` (uuid, primary key)
    - `protocol_name` (text, exact name, unique)
    - `category` (text, service category)
    - `target_concerns` (text[], array of concerns)
    - `modalities_steps` (jsonb, nullable, steps/modalities if available)
    - `typical_duration` (text, nullable)
    - `allowed_products` (text[], nullable)
    - `contraindications` (text[], nullable)
    - `created_at` (timestamptz)

  2. `pro_products` - Professional-use products
    - `id` (uuid, primary key)
    - `product_name` (text, exact name, unique)
    - `product_function` (text, function/outcomes)
    - `key_ingredients` (text[], nullable)
    - `in_service_usage_allowed` (text, yes/no/unknown)
    - `contraindications` (text[], nullable)
    - `created_at` (timestamptz)

  3. `retail_products` - Take-home retail products
    - `id` (uuid, primary key)
    - `product_name` (text, exact name, unique)
    - `product_function` (text, function/outcomes)
    - `target_concerns` (text[], concerns addressed)
    - `key_ingredients` (text[], nullable)
    - `regimen_placement` (text, nullable, AM/PM)
    - `created_at` (timestamptz)

  4. `mixing_rules` - Product combination and formulation rules
    - `id` (uuid, primary key)
    - `rule_type` (text, compatibility/concentration/restriction)
    - `product_references` (text[], products involved)
    - `rule_description` (text, the rule constraint)
    - `severity` (text, mandatory/warning/info)
    - `created_at` (timestamptz)

  5. `treatment_costs` - COGS data for treatments
    - `id` (uuid, primary key)
    - `item_type` (text, protocol/product/step)
    - `item_reference` (text, name or identifier)
    - `cost_per_unit` (numeric, nullable)
    - `unit_type` (text, nullable, ml/application/treatment)
    - `typical_usage_amount` (numeric, nullable)
    - `notes` (text, nullable)
    - `created_at` (timestamptz)

  ### Spa Menu Management

  6. `spa_menus` - Uploaded spa menus
    - `id` (uuid, primary key)
    - `spa_name` (text)
    - `upload_date` (timestamptz)
    - `raw_menu_data` (text, original menu text/data)
    - `parse_status` (text, pending/parsed/reviewed)
    - `created_at` (timestamptz)

  7. `spa_services` - Parsed individual services
    - `id` (uuid, primary key)
    - `menu_id` (uuid, foreign key to spa_menus)
    - `service_name` (text)
    - `category` (text)
    - `duration` (text, nullable)
    - `price` (numeric, nullable)
    - `description` (text, nullable)
    - `keywords` (text[], extracted keywords)
    - `created_at` (timestamptz)

  8. `service_mappings` - Mapping results
    - `id` (uuid, primary key)
    - `service_id` (uuid, foreign key to spa_services)
    - `solution_type` (text, Protocol/Custom-Built)
    - `solution_reference` (text, protocol name or custom treatment name)
    - `match_type` (text, Direct Fit/Partial Fit/Adjacent Opportunity)
    - `confidence` (text, High/Medium/Low)
    - `rationale` (text)
    - `custom_build_details` (jsonb, nullable, products and steps for custom builds)
    - `retail_attach` (text[], SKU recommendations)
    - `cogs_status` (text, Known/Partial/Unknown)
    - `cogs_amount` (numeric, nullable)
    - `pricing_guidance` (text, nullable)
    - `created_at` (timestamptz)

  ## Security
  All tables enable RLS with policies for authenticated users.
*/

-- Canonical Protocols
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS canonical_protocols (
  id uuid PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  protocol_name text UNIQUE NOT NULL,
  category text NOT NULL,
  target_concerns text[] DEFAULT '{}',
  modalities_steps jsonb,
  typical_duration text,
  allowed_products text[] DEFAULT '{}',
  contraindications text[] DEFAULT '{}',
  created_at timestamptz DEFAULT now()
);

ALTER TABLE canonical_protocols ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY;

CREATE POLICY "Allow authenticated users to read canonical_protocols"
  ON canonical_protocols FOR SELECT
  TO authenticated
  USING (true);

CREATE POLICY "Allow authenticated users to insert canonical_protocols"
  ON canonical_protocols FOR INSERT
  TO authenticated
  WITH CHECK (true);

CREATE POLICY "Allow authenticated users to update canonical_protocols"
  ON canonical_protocols FOR UPDATE
  TO authenticated
  USING (true)
  WITH CHECK (true);

CREATE POLICY "Allow authenticated users to delete canonical_protocols"
  ON canonical_protocols FOR DELETE
  TO authenticated
  USING (true);

-- PRO Products
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS pro_products (
  id uuid PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  product_name text UNIQUE NOT NULL,
  product_function text NOT NULL,
  key_ingredients text[] DEFAULT '{}',
  in_service_usage_allowed text DEFAULT 'unknown',
  contraindications text[] DEFAULT '{}',
  created_at timestamptz DEFAULT now()
);

ALTER TABLE pro_products ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY;

CREATE POLICY "Allow authenticated users to read pro_products"
  ON pro_products FOR SELECT
  TO authenticated
  USING (true);

CREATE POLICY "Allow authenticated users to insert pro_products"
  ON pro_products FOR INSERT
  TO authenticated
  WITH CHECK (true);

CREATE POLICY "Allow authenticated users to update pro_products"
  ON pro_products FOR UPDATE
  TO authenticated
  USING (true)
  WITH CHECK (true);

CREATE POLICY "Allow authenticated users to delete pro_products"
  ON pro_products FOR DELETE
  TO authenticated
  USING (true);

-- Retail Products
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS retail_products (
  id uuid PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  product_name text UNIQUE NOT NULL,
  product_function text NOT NULL,
  target_concerns text[] DEFAULT '{}',
  key_ingredients text[] DEFAULT '{}',
  regimen_placement text,
  created_at timestamptz DEFAULT now()
);

ALTER TABLE retail_products ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY;

CREATE POLICY "Allow authenticated users to read retail_products"
  ON retail_products FOR SELECT
  TO authenticated
  USING (true);

CREATE POLICY "Allow authenticated users to insert retail_products"
  ON retail_products FOR INSERT
  TO authenticated
  WITH CHECK (true);

CREATE POLICY "Allow authenticated users to update retail_products"
  ON retail_products FOR UPDATE
  TO authenticated
  USING (true)
  WITH CHECK (true);

CREATE POLICY "Allow authenticated users to delete retail_products"
  ON retail_products FOR DELETE
  TO authenticated
  USING (true);

-- Mixing Rules
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS mixing_rules (
  id uuid PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  rule_type text NOT NULL,
  product_references text[] DEFAULT '{}',
  rule_description text NOT NULL,
  severity text DEFAULT 'mandatory',
  created_at timestamptz DEFAULT now()
);

ALTER TABLE mixing_rules ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY;

CREATE POLICY "Allow authenticated users to read mixing_rules"
  ON mixing_rules FOR SELECT
  TO authenticated
  USING (true);

CREATE POLICY "Allow authenticated users to insert mixing_rules"
  ON mixing_rules FOR INSERT
  TO authenticated
  WITH CHECK (true);

CREATE POLICY "Allow authenticated users to update mixing_rules"
  ON mixing_rules FOR UPDATE
  TO authenticated
  USING (true)
  WITH CHECK (true);

CREATE POLICY "Allow authenticated users to delete mixing_rules"
  ON mixing_rules FOR DELETE
  TO authenticated
  USING (true);

-- Treatment Costs
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS treatment_costs (
  id uuid PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  item_type text NOT NULL,
  item_reference text NOT NULL,
  cost_per_unit numeric,
  unit_type text,
  typical_usage_amount numeric,
  notes text,
  created_at timestamptz DEFAULT now()
);

ALTER TABLE treatment_costs ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY;

CREATE POLICY "Allow authenticated users to read treatment_costs"
  ON treatment_costs FOR SELECT
  TO authenticated
  USING (true);

CREATE POLICY "Allow authenticated users to insert treatment_costs"
  ON treatment_costs FOR INSERT
  TO authenticated
  WITH CHECK (true);

CREATE POLICY "Allow authenticated users to update treatment_costs"
  ON treatment_costs FOR UPDATE
  TO authenticated
  USING (true)
  WITH CHECK (true);

CREATE POLICY "Allow authenticated users to delete treatment_costs"
  ON treatment_costs FOR DELETE
  TO authenticated
  USING (true);

-- Spa Menus
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS spa_menus (
  id uuid PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  spa_name text NOT NULL,
  upload_date timestamptz DEFAULT now(),
  raw_menu_data text NOT NULL,
  parse_status text DEFAULT 'pending',
  created_at timestamptz DEFAULT now()
);

ALTER TABLE spa_menus ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY;

CREATE POLICY "Allow authenticated users to read spa_menus"
  ON spa_menus FOR SELECT
  TO authenticated
  USING (true);

CREATE POLICY "Allow authenticated users to insert spa_menus"
  ON spa_menus FOR INSERT
  TO authenticated
  WITH CHECK (true);

CREATE POLICY "Allow authenticated users to update spa_menus"
  ON spa_menus FOR UPDATE
  TO authenticated
  USING (true)
  WITH CHECK (true);

CREATE POLICY "Allow authenticated users to delete spa_menus"
  ON spa_menus FOR DELETE
  TO authenticated
  USING (true);

-- Spa Services
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS spa_services (
  id uuid PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  menu_id uuid REFERENCES spa_menus(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  service_name text NOT NULL,
  category text NOT NULL,
  duration text,
  price numeric,
  description text,
  keywords text[] DEFAULT '{}',
  created_at timestamptz DEFAULT now()
);

ALTER TABLE spa_services ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY;

CREATE POLICY "Allow authenticated users to read spa_services"
  ON spa_services FOR SELECT
  TO authenticated
  USING (true);

CREATE POLICY "Allow authenticated users to insert spa_services"
  ON spa_services FOR INSERT
  TO authenticated
  WITH CHECK (true);

CREATE POLICY "Allow authenticated users to update spa_services"
  ON spa_services FOR UPDATE
  TO authenticated
  USING (true)
  WITH CHECK (true);

CREATE POLICY "Allow authenticated users to delete spa_services"
  ON spa_services FOR DELETE
  TO authenticated
  USING (true);

-- Service Mappings
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS service_mappings (
  id uuid PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  service_id uuid REFERENCES spa_services(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  solution_type text NOT NULL,
  solution_reference text NOT NULL,
  match_type text NOT NULL,
  confidence text NOT NULL,
  rationale text NOT NULL,
  custom_build_details jsonb,
  retail_attach text[] DEFAULT '{}',
  cogs_status text DEFAULT 'Unknown',
  cogs_amount numeric,
  pricing_guidance text,
  created_at timestamptz DEFAULT now()
);

ALTER TABLE service_mappings ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY;

CREATE POLICY "Allow authenticated users to read service_mappings"
  ON service_mappings FOR SELECT
  TO authenticated
  USING (true);

CREATE POLICY "Allow authenticated users to insert service_mappings"
  ON service_mappings FOR INSERT

CREATE POLICY "Allow authenticated users to update service_mappings"
  ON service_mappings FOR UPDATE
  TO authenticated
  USING (true)
  WITH CHECK (true);

CREATE POLICY "Allow authenticated users to delete service_mappings"
  ON service_mappings FOR DELETE
  TO authenticated
  USING (true);

-- Create indexes for common queries
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_spa_services_menu_id ON spa_services(menu_id);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_service_mappings_service_id ON service_mappings(service_id);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_canonical_protocols_category ON canonical_protocols(category);
```
